title: Alberta health minister says children's pain meds from Turkey are safe for patients overseas
author: Julia Wong
notes: Updates EVT-059 Turkish medication story. Key new facts: 1.4M bottles unused (of 5M ordered, only 30% received); AHS used medication ~2 months before stopping; stopped in NICUs due to feeding tube clogging risk; Smith proposes donating to Ukraine; auditor general probe now includes medications. LaGrange: 'good quality drugs.' Anchors extended EVT-059.
